creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Have you ever stayed at a hotel like this? 👀

I first stayed at this hotel in Thailand last year, in one of their ‘normal’ hotel rooms, but after seeing photos of their ocean-view pool villas, I knew I had to go back…  So I’m back in Koh Yao Yai at one of my all-time favorite hotels, @santhiya.kohyaoyai   I paid €1565 / $1712 for 4 nights in the ocean-view pool villa, including breakfast. Definitely not cheap for Thailand, but compared to what you pay for hotels in Europe, I think it’s worth the money.

The hotel is in Koh Yao Yai, a small island in the Andaman Sea between Phuket and Krabi. You can reach the hotel directly from Phuket in 20 minutes by speed boat, so starting or ending your trip to Thailand here is pretty easy.   I’m not afraid to talk sh*t about the hotels I stay at, but I genuinely like this hotel so much and I think they deserve all the praise they’re getting on social media 🙌  #thailand #hotels #traveltips #phuket #krabi

transcription.text: I think I found the best hotel in Thailand. It's a peaceful place with lots of privacy and it's the perfect place to go all-in on relaxation but its location in the Andaman Sea is also perfect for day trips to some of the most stunning islands in Thailand. My private pool villa has the most amazing ocean view so it's hard for me to leave the villa but at breakfast I've seen that there's also a massive infinity pool and the hotel's also got a private beach as well as a few other restaurants so Santia Koyao Yai is a 10 out of 10 hotel in Thailand for me.
